<{%reset%}>    [id=0e1c2ec8-bb01-4df1-be4d-e0131ea0f133]

<{%reset%}>    [id=0e1c2ec8-bb01-4df1-be4d-e0131ea0f133]

<{%reset%}>    [urn=urn:pulumi:test::test::pkgA:m:typA::resB]
